title: Acrorumohra × subreflexipinna

taxonomy: Acrorumohra × subreflexipinna is a hybrid species within the family Asparagaceae and the genus Acrorumohra. It belongs to the kingdom Plantae and is classified as a type of flowering plant. The classification of Acrorumohra × subreflexipinna is further refined within the taxonomic hierarchy as follows: kingdom - Plantae, clade - angiosperms, clade - monocots, order - Asparagales, family - Asparagaceae, genus - Acrorumohra, hybrid - subreflexipinna. Acrorumohra × subreflexipinna is likely an intergeneric hybrid, combining characteristics from its parent species. This classification is subject to change based on ongoing research and updates in the field of taxonomy.
